```
          "2:LEN": "services:\n  redis:\n    image: redis:7-alpine\n    command: [\"redis-server\", \"--save\", \"\", \"--appendonly\", \"no\"]\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"redis-cli\", \"ping\"]\n      interval: 2s\n      timeout: 2s\n      retries: 10\n\n  test:\n    build: .\n    command: [\"python\", \"-m\", \"pytest\", \"tests\", \"-m\", \"integration or not integration\"]\n    environment:\n      DATABASE_URL: sqlite:////tmp/mini_celery_test.db\n      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379/15\n      WORKER_QUEUES: default\n      PYTHONPATH: /app\n    depends_on:\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "668521846de2f9a725604768452b9c1ffe3db2cf3f94d023142145d83fab45c6",

      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "services:\n  redis:\n    image: redis:7-alpine\n    command: [\"redis-server\", \"--appendonly\", \"yes\"]\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"redis-cli\", \"ping\"]\n      interval: 3s\n      timeout: 3s\n      retries: 10\n    volumes:\n      - redis-data:/data\n\n  api:\n    build: .\n    command: [\"uvicorn\", \"mini_celery.api.main:app\", \"--host\", \"0.0.0.0\", \"--port\", \"8000\"]\n    environment:\n      DATABASE_URL: sqlite:////app/data/mini_celery.db\n      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379/0\n      SCHEDULER_CONFIG_PATH: /app/config/schedules.yaml\n      WORKER_QUEUES: default\n    depends_on:\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    ports:\n      - \"8000:8000\"\n    volumes:\n      - app-data:/app/data\n\n  worker:\n    build: .\n    command: [\"python\", \"-m\", \"mini_celery.worker.main\"]\n    environment:\n      DATABASE_URL: sqlite:////app/data/mini_celery.db\n      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379/0\n      WORKER_QUEUES: default\n      WORKER_CONCURRENCY: 4\n    depends_on:\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    volumes:\n      - app-data:/app/data\n\n  scheduler:\n    build: .\n    command: [\"python\", \"-m\", \"mini_celery.scheduler.main\"]\n    environment:\n      DATABASE_URL: sqlite:////app/data/mini_celery.db\n      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379/0\n      SCHEDULER_CONFIG_PATH: /app/config/schedules.yaml\n      WORKER_QUEUES: default\n    depends_on:\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    volumes:\n      - app-data:/app/data\n\nvolumes:\n  app-data:\n  redis-data:\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "30b60e22dee11e6e5cec90ec667b7915afd57cae27cf414dab4a3f1c3dae08d9",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": "."
      },
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
```
